title.en: Ye Tian made a respectful look.

content.en:
"I've seen the ancestor!"

Ye Tian made a respectful look.

After all, he is now the identity of the Ancient Star Clan, because he is naturally more respectful to this mysterious existence, otherwise how can he get benefits?

"You, very good!"

Mystical consciousness spoke.

"Thank you Ancestor for your praise!" Ye Tiandao.

At this time, the mystical consciousness begins to introduce itself: " My name is Xing, and the other supreme ones call me the star ancestor, I am the oldest life at the beginning of the source sea, and my physique is extremely strong, although it is the realm of the Ninefold Supreme, but the combat power is far beyond the realm of the other Ninefold Supreme, unless it is a half-step to cross the level of the Supreme, I am qualified to compete with me, but unfortunately I met a great enemy, that great enemy is not only a half-step across the Supreme, but also walked on that step for a long time, in only one step to cross the Supreme realm, stepping into a new realm, in fact, the great enemy can not kill me, because my body is too strong, the recovery ability is too strong, almost immortal, so he sealed me。 "

Ye Tian listened, but he was shocked in his heart.

This ancient existence named Star Ancestor is so powerful, and the life-preserving ability is so strong, not to mention the strength, the life-preserving ability alone is more powerful than the Void Source Ancestor, after all, the Void Source Ancestor fell and died, while the star is still alive.

But in terms of combat effectiveness, the Star Ancestor should be about the same as the Void Source Ancestor.

The Supreme One is divided into nine folds, and the nine folds are the highest, and according to his understanding, the Void Source Ancestor stepped out of the Ninefold Supreme One, and crossed the Supreme One realm in half a step, so his strength is very strong, but the Star Ancestor's body is too strong.

Therefore, the combat power of the two sides should be comparable.

Xingzu said a lot, but they all talked about how strong he was and how resentful he was against his enemies.

"Ancestor, how can I save you!" Ye Tian said this, if he didn't say it, he wouldn't be valued by Xingzu, and even be suspicious of Xingzu.

Seeing that Ye Tian was so eager to save himself, the Star Ancestor was immediately very relieved, and said: "If you want to rescue me, the minimum requirement is to have the realm of the Sevenfold Supreme, and the ascension of each realm of the Supreme is extremely difficult, and the ten Supreme Beings of the Ancient Star Clan are only the Triple Supreme, and their ultimate potential is at most the Fourfold Supreme, so they can't save me, but you are different, you have an ancient astral body at the level of the Eternal Ancestor, and you have the hope of reaching the Sevenfold Supreme in the future." "

Ye Tian asked, "Ancestor, can a talent determine the future?"

"Of course I can't decide!" Xingzu said with a smile: "But the ancient star body is not simple, originally I didn't have an ancient star body, but at the beginning of the source sea, there were a lot of good things, I got a treasure to create the ancient star body, and finally created the ancient star source body." There are many kinds of origin bodies in the source sea, and the source bodies of each faction are different. However, the Source Body is roughly divided into Ordinary Source Body, Peak Source Body, God Source Body, and Eternal Body!

Ye Tian heard it, the ordinary source body is like the invincible body condensed by the invincible body robbery method of the heavenly wind and sea, the top source body is equivalent to the ten thousand sources returning to the ruins, and the god source body is equivalent to the void source body achieved by the ordinary son of the void. And the perfect Void Source Body and even Ye Tian's Endless Source Body all belong to the Eternal Body. The Void Source Ancestor's Void Source Body should be a lower-level Eternal Body, while Ye Tian's Endless Source Body should belong to the Middle Eternal Body.

However, the Ancient Star Source Body is a high-level Eternal Body, if the Ancient Star Source Body of the Upper Eternal Body is raised to the level of an Eternal Tribulation Body, how powerful would it be?

"Ancestor, can you cultivate two eternal bodies at the same time?"

Ye Tian asked.

He didn't want to give up the Endless Source Body he had created, and besides, the Endless Source Body was the most suitable eternal body for him, and it would be a pity to give up.

Therefore, if you can cultivate two eternal bodies at the same time, then you don't have to worry.

"Yes!" Star Ancestor replied in the affirmative, If you want to cultivate two eternal bodies, it is naturally possible, but it is very difficult, first of all, you must split out a clone, let the clone cultivate another eternal body, once the doppelganger has practiced another eternal body, you can try to make the doppelganger and the ontology merge into one, but the doppelganger itself will be affected by the ontology, it is very difficult to practice into another eternal body, and what is even more difficult is the fusion problem, the two eternal bodies want to fuse, once they fail, whether it is the ontology or the doppelganger, it will be damaged, it is the kind that hurts the foundation. In the source sea, there are treasures that can help the fusion of two eternal bodies, such as the Void Saint Crystal, this kind of treasure can help the fusion of two eternal bodies, which can increase the chance of success by half, but even I haven't gotten such a treasure. "

Void Crystal!

Ye Tian didn't think that he could get such a treasure, but it didn't mean that he couldn't succeed.

He can let this replica body cultivate the Ancient Star Source Body, and he also has an invincible Ancestor clone, plus the main body, there are a total of three bodies.

In order to ensure that the foundation of the ontology is not damaged, it is completely possible to fuse the invincible ancestor clone and the copy body again and again, even if it fails, the price paid is not very large.

If he thoroughly grasps the trick of fusion, and the success rate reaches nearly 100%, he can make the replica body fuse with the main body, so that the main body has a new powerful eternal body after the fusion of the two eternal bodies.

In that case, his Eternal Body will probably surpass the ordinary Upper Eternal Body and reach the top Eternal Body level.

He didn't reveal this secret to the Star Ancestor, and he didn't even ask about the Eternal Body Fusion anymore, otherwise it would be easy to arouse suspicion if he talked too much.

Subsequently, Xingzu began to guide Ye Tian's cultivation, and passed it on to Ye Tian the true Ancient Star Source Body Method.

The true Ancient Star Source Body Method must have the Eternal Ancestor level Ancient Star Body Talent in order to condense the true Ancient Star Body Source Body, while the other Ancient Star Clan powerhouses only condensed the mutilated and weakened version of the Ancient Star Body Tribulation Body, but it also surpassed the top Body Tribulation Methods in the outside world.

Xingzu didn't know that Ye Tian was an outsider at all, but regarded Ye Tian as his hope to get out of trouble, helped Ye Tian wholeheartedly, explained and guided the Gu Xingyuan Body Method again and again, and even let the Gu Xing Clan hang a lot of resources to help Ye Tian grow up.

Before you know it, dozens of great tribulations have passed.

With the help of the Star Ancestor and the Ancient Star Clan, Ye Tian's Ancient Star Clan's replica body has reached the realm of a first-class invincible, and the Gu Xing Source Body has also completed its second growth, and with the eternal resources provided by the Gu Star Clan, the Gu Xing Source Body has also completed its promotion and has become the Gu Xing Eternal Tribulation Body.

In addition, Ye Tian had also created a supreme technique that fit the ancient star clan, so at this moment, he could absorb the origin of the ancient star stone at any time, and then use the origin of the ancient star stone to absorb the origin of other eternal source objects, thus impacting the supreme realm.

That's right, the origin of the Ancient Star Stone is like the Void Source Monument, and at the same time, it can allow Ye Tian to absorb the origin of other eternal source things, which is also the strength of the Ancient Star Stone.

this day.

Ye Tian is ready to impact the Supreme Realm, once this copy body reaches the Supreme Realm, he will choose to annihilate the clone of the Dark Forbidden Domain, transform the copy body of the Ancient Star Clan into a clone, and sit in the Star Ancient Domain all the time, and even completely occupy the Star Ancient Domain in the future.

As for Xingzu, he wouldn't really help him get out of trouble.

With the resources provided by the Ancient Star Clan, he will not lack eternal resources in the future, and he will have enough resources to fuse the two eternal bodies again and again.
